/** * Sets the Analyzer to be used when querying fields of this type. * *

* The default implementation throws a SolrException. * Subclasses that override this method need to ensure the behavior * of the analyzer is consistent with the implementation of toInternal. *

* * @see #toInternal * @see #setAnalyzer * @see #getQueryAnalyzer */
javadoc_after:
/** * Sets the Analyzer to be used when querying fields of this type. * *

* Subclasses should override {@link #supportsAnalyzers()} to * enable this function. *

* * @see #supportsAnalyzers() * @see #setIndexAnalyzer * @see #getQueryAnalyzer */
